prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约1371名→2892名→3120名→3689名→5404名，呈持续大幅后移趋势（位次数字快速增大），近3年累计后移约2284名，竞争持续加剧；2025年基准约5404名；该校在吉林省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2025年分别为18人、18人、18人、24人、24人；2026年计划仍为24人，与2025年持平，计划无变化，对竞争格局影响中性。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1371 → 2892 → 3120 → 3689 → 5404, showing a continuous and significant backward trend (ranking numbers rapidly increasing), with a cumulative backward shift of about 2284 over the past 3 years, indicating intensifying competition; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 5404; the enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jilin Province from 2021 to 2025 was 18, 18, 18, 24, 24 respectively; the 2026 plan remains at 24, unchanged from 2025, with no change in plan, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to top-tier finance and economics institutions, with a solid level and strong appeal to high-scoring science students; no related public opinion events for Shanghai University of Finance and Economics were found in the 2026 reputation evaluation data, with overall reputation stable; ranked 99th in Douyin comprehensive popularity, rated as 'average', with no significant signs of increased application attention; no record of enrollment gaps in historical admission anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Statistics received A-, Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, highly correlated with science enrollment majors (Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, Finance Dual Degree, etc.), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Computer Science was rated as 'recommended', Electronics/Communication as 'highly recommended', Electrical Engineering as 'highly recommended', with overall high popularity in science and engineering; Finance/Finance/Economics was rated as 'differentiated wait-and-see'; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is approximately 110,868, with an estimated 79,968 in the physics category, a slight decrease of about 453 compared to 2025 (80,421), slightly easing competition pressure; Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, which is an inter-provincial application for Jilin candidates; the enrollment plan for the physics category in Jilin Province has been stable at 24 in recent years, with no local preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in physics category candidates in the province, stable school reputation, and overall high popularity in science and engineering but differentiation in finance and economics, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will continue to slightly shift upward (competition slightly intensifies) based on the 2025 ranking of 5404; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5464, with a range of 4964–5964.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4964–5964, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Accounting majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 Statistics, Mathematics, and Data Science as reach options (requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower end of the range), and Tier 3 Business Administration, Public Finance, and E-commerce as safety options. If your ranking is within 4964, you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
